name: bpf-linker
title: bpf-linker
description:
simplify building modern BPF programs
This package contains bpd-linker which can be used to statically link multiple
BPF object files together and optionally perform optimizations needed to
target older kernels. It operates on LLVM bitcode, so the inputs must be
bitcode files (.bc) or object files with embedded bitcode (.o), optionally
stored inside ar archives (.a).

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for bpf-linker.
arguments.raw: -linker  Option present in package usage line for bpf-linker.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use bpf-linker because simplify building modern BPF programs.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use bpf-linker as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `bpf-linker [options] [args]` as documented upstream for bpf-linker.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair bpf-linker with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `bpf-linker --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
